content: Multiple independent scientific imaging pipelines (MCMICRO, Cell Painting Gallery/CellProfiler, Batch-Mask, IMC Segmentation Pipeline, SPACEc) converge on the same architecture: an interactive/manual segmentation or correction stage produces mask files, which are then consumed by a fully separate automated batch-measurement stage that computes quantification (area, intensity, morphology) and writes tabular output (CSV/DataTable), plus a QC stage producing composite overlay images. Masks-as-interface is the standard decoupling point between human-in-the-loop and automated stages.
